name: OpenLLM (BentoML LLM Serving Platform)

auth.notes: Bearer token auth when deployed; optional locally

performance.notes: vLLM/transformers backend; continuous batching; depends on model size and GPU

agent_readiness.notes: One-command LLM serving platform built on BentoML. openllm serve llama3:8b — instant HTTP server. openllm run mistral:7b-instruct. OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint. import openllm. client = openllm.client.HTTPClient('http://localhost:3000'). client.generate('Hello'). Supports: Llama 3, Mistral, Phi, Gemma, Qwen, CodeLlama. Backends: vLLM (GPU), transformers (fallback). BentoCloud deployment. Model repository with pre-configured quantization. Streaming via SSE. OpenAI SDK compatibility for easy migration.

gotchas: Less flexible than building directly on vLLM for custom pipelines
best_when: One-command local LLM serving with OpenAI API compatibility
Teams wanting managed LLM deployment on BentoCloud
Rapid prototyping with open models (Llama, Mistral, Phi)
When OpenAI SDK compatibility needed for self-hosted models
avoid_when: Custom LLM pipelines (build on vLLM directly)
Production at scale without BentoCloud (ops overhead)
When Ollama suffices for simpler self-hosting
summary: OpenLLM is BentoML's one-command LLM serving platform. openllm serve llama3:8b starts an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server. Supports Llama 3, Mistral, Phi, Gemma, Qwen. vLLM backend for GPU, transformers fallback. OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint — use existing OpenAI SDK clients. BentoCloud for managed deployment. Streaming SSE support. Best for teams wanting quick self-hosted LLM serving with OpenAI API compatibility.
